## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes with no errors
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes with no failures
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes with no errors
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (or explain why tests are not applicable)
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in the relevant `README.md`
- [ ] If this is a breaking change, a changeset has been added (`pnpm changeset`)
